sigma.title: CodeIntegrity - Blocked Image/Driver Load For Policy Violation
CodeIntegrity - Blocked Driver Load With Revoked Certificate
Service Installed By Unusual Client - Security
Service Installed By Unusual Client - System

osquery.name: t1543_005_crontab
osquery.query_text: SELECT event, minute, hour, day_of_month, month, day_of_week, command, path FROM crontab;

osquery.name: t1543_005_startup
osquery.query_text: SELECT name, path, source, status, type FROM startup_items;

osquery.name: t1543_005_suid
osquery.query_text: SELECT path, username, groupname, permissions FROM suid_bin;

osquery_matches.name: t1543_005_suid
osquery_matches.query_text: SELECT path, username, groupname, permissions FROM suid_bin;
